title: MyCaseValue Platform Launch
description: Initial release of MyCaseValue with 4.1M+ federal court cases across 84 NOS codes and 94 federal judicial districts. Data sourced from FJC Integrated Database through Q3 2024.

title: Q4 2024 FJC Data Refresh
description: Quarterly data update incorporating new case filings, dispositions, and settlements from the FJC Integrated Database. Win rates and settlement ranges recalculated across all NOS codes.

title: AI Attorney Tools Suite Launch
description: Released six AI-powered attorney tools: Research Memo Generator, Demand Letter Drafting, Case Predictor, Discovery Generator, Deposition Prep, and Document Intelligence.

title: EEOC & NLRB Data Integration
description: Added EEOC charge pipeline data for employment discrimination NOS codes and NLRB case activity data for labor relations pages.
